visual_description: A man with short dark hair is shown in a close-up, his face partially obscured by shadow, with a single tear visible on his cheek. The scene cuts to a wider shot of a dimly lit room where two men sit at a table facing a third man in a suit who is seated behind a desk. A fourth man in a plaid shirt enters through a doorway in the background.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, narrative tone. The audio is clear and intelligible.
